title: stelis catenata
intro: Stelis catenata, also known as the chain orchid, is a type of orchid species found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to treat various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin infections. The health benefits of Stelis catenata include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Stelis catenata often involve boiling the plant's roots and leaves in water or using it in tea form to harness its medicinal properties.
